classified_items.description: TemplateCandidate schema + TemplateRegistry class. 15 TemplateType values, 7 TemplateStatus values, full CRUD, find_matching(), generate_candidate_from_outcome(). Loads from data/umh/templates/ by default.
classified_items.notes: Code is complete and correct. The mechanism is sound. The gap is data, not code.

classified_items.description: CandidateBuilder builds candidates from contradictions and world model gaps. AutonomousLanePolicy.require_template=True gates all candidates on template match. _evaluate() check: checks['template_exists'] = bool(candidate.matching_template_id).
classified_items.notes: Code is correct. The require_template gate is intentional — it enforces that no candidate executes without a proven pattern. The fix is seeding templates, not relaxing the gate.

classified_items.description: Ontological blueprint system — TemplateSlot, Template, TemplateInstance for business/personal/audience/universal templates. 8 business templates (coaching_program, agency, digital_product, ecommerce, saas, incubator_studio, real_estate_development, personal_brand). Different system from execution templates.
classified_items.notes: This module is not relevant to the execution template supply chain. It is an older ontological schema that is orthogonal to organism execution templates. No action needed for Phase 10.0.
classified_items.phase_action_required: none — out of scope for execution template supply

classified_items.description: Phase 89 business template inventory: revenue ops, outreach, sales, onboarding templates. 40 candidates from 2026-05-03.
classified_items.notes: Business operation templates (outreach playbooks, sales scripts, CRM formats). Not execution templates. Out of scope for Phase 10.0 which targets the autonomous improvement supply chain.

classified_items.description: Phase 96.3/96.4 business template promotion policy: 7-step promotion lifecycle with privacy review. For instance pattern abstraction.
classified_items.notes: Business template governance policy, not execution template governance. Execution governance is in autonomous_improvement_lane.py (code) and will be extended in Phase 5.

classified_items.description: Single template candidate from Phase 9.5b proof trial. Type=maintenance_action, status=raw, confidence=0.6, 1 observed success. source_trial_ids=['proof-phase95-001'].
classified_items.notes: Evidence comes from a proof trial (trial_id=proof-phase95-001), not from real phase execution. Validation stub is generic: 'Re-run verification after action'. Rollback stub is generic: 'Revert to pre-execution state'. Also stored at wrong path — runtime registry does not load from trials/proof_templates/. Confidence=0.6 meets the threshold but evidence quality is insufficient for candidate_ready.
classified_items.phase_action_required: Phase 4: copy/seed with real evidence reference + specific validation/rollback

classified_items.description: 17 template candidates generated during Phase 9.5b trial campaign, 1 promoted to canonical. All were in a temporary test store_dir — not persisted to any runtime path.
classified_items.notes: Campaign results confirm the generation mechanism works. But these templates were never written to data/umh/organism/templates/ or data/umh/templates/. They exist only in the campaign results JSON as counts. Cannot be loaded by runtime registry.
classified_items.phase_action_required: Phase 4: use as evidence source for seeding, not as templates themselves

classified_items.description: 12 outcome records that could feed generate_candidate_from_outcome(). All have outcome_id=null, success=null, phase=null. Record keys: id, action_type, plan_id, step_id, description, status, expected_result, actual_result, duration_seconds, error, recorded_at, record_type.
classified_items.notes: The null outcome_id means any template generated from these would have source_outcome_ids=[]. Templates would have no traceable evidence back to real phase outcomes. These records are structurally incomplete and cannot be used as evidence for candidate_ready templates. Phase 4 must use Phase 9.x autonomous_lane artifacts as evidence instead.
classified_items.phase_action_required: Phase 4: do NOT use these as evidence. Use autonomous_lane/ phase JSONs instead.

candidate_discovery_gaps.title: Runtime template store path does not exist
candidate_discovery_gaps.description: daemon.py initializes TemplateRegistry at data/umh/organism/templates/ (str(self._state_dir / 'templates')). This directory has never been created. TemplateRegistry._load_from_path() opens template_candidates.jsonl and templates.jsonl — both 404. Result: _candidates={} and _promoted={}.
candidate_discovery_gaps.fix_in_phase: Phase 4 — create directory and seed production templates there

candidate_discovery_gaps.title: require_template=True gates all candidates when registry is empty
candidate_discovery_gaps.description: AutonomousLanePolicy.require_template=True (default). CandidateEvaluator.evaluate() lines 499-508: when find_matching() returns [], candidate.matching_template_id='', checks['template_exists']=False, reasons.append('no matching template found'). All candidates are blocked.
candidate_discovery_gaps.fix_in_phase: Phase 4 — seed templates so find_matching() returns non-empty results

candidate_discovery_gaps.title: Only existing template data record is at wrong path
candidate_discovery_gaps.description: tpl-0b21c294 lives at data/umh/trials/proof_templates/template_candidates.jsonl. Runtime registry loads from data/umh/organism/templates/template_candidates.jsonl. These paths have no overlap. The one proof template has never been loadable at runtime.
candidate_discovery_gaps.fix_in_phase: Phase 4 — seed proper templates to organism/templates/ with real evidence

candidate_discovery_gaps.title: trial_outcomes.jsonl records have null outcome_id and success fields
candidate_discovery_gaps.description: All 12 records in trial_outcomes.jsonl have outcome_id=null, success=null, phase=null. Record schema uses id/action_type/plan_id not outcome_id/success — structurally incompatible with generate_candidate_from_outcome(). Templates from these records are untraceable — no verifiable evidence chain.
candidate_discovery_gaps.fix_in_phase: Phase 4 — use autonomous_lane/ phase artifacts (phase9_6, phase9_7, phase9_8, phase9_9) as evidence sources instead

candidate_discovery_gaps.title: Zero templates exist for any of the 15 TemplateType values
candidate_discovery_gaps.description: 15 TemplateType values are defined. CandidateBuilder._enrich_with_template() uses find_matching(action_type, description) which infers template_type and matches on that. With 0 templates of any type, every find_matching() call returns []. Even after gap-1 is fixed, every template type needed by real candidates must have at least one seeded instance.
candidate_discovery_gaps.affected_code: substrate/organism/template_registry.py TemplateType enum — 15 values, 0 populated instances in runtime path
candidate_discovery_gaps.fix_in_phase: Phase 4 — seed at minimum: MAINTENANCE_ACTION, CONTRADICTION_FIX, READINESS_IMPROVEMENT, OBSERVATION_ACCURACY_FIX, WORLD_MODEL_ACCURACY_FIX

missing_categories.description: Fix a declared file path in world model or config that does not match filesystem reality
Clear a specific contradiction engine flag by correcting the divergent state or declaration
Execute a targeted improvement to raise one readiness dimension score above threshold
Update stale world model observations by triggering a re-scan of changed file or endpoint
Fix a specific failing test assertion without modifying the feature under test
Update a documentation file to match current code state, removing stale references
missing_categories.evidence_reference: data/audits/ — multiple drift reports document this pattern

missing_categories.description: Trigger graph rebuild when graph staleness is detected and graph is older than 24h
Add a missing cockpit API route for an existing substrate feature that has no surface
Extract route groups from a Python file exceeding the 3000-line quality gate
missing_categories.evidence_reference: Phase 2 execution — cockpit.py went from 3542 to under 3000 lines using this exact pattern

missing_categories.description: Align an API response shape with the declared contract when a drift is detected

candidate_ready.note: Nothing qualifies — all data records lack real phase evidence or have path mismatches

items: src-state-template-registry-module (different ontological domain — business blueprints not execution templates)
src-template-promotion-policy-doc (business ops domain — instance pattern abstraction)
trial-outcomes-12-records (null outcome_id and success fields make them structurally unusable for generation)

duplicate.note: Too few templates to produce duplicates

evidence_to_avoid: data/umh/trials/proof_templates/template_candidates.jsonl (proof trial only — not real phase execution)
phase4_seeding_instructions.validation_requirement: Each seeded template must have a specific, actionable validation_strategy — NOT the generic 'Re-run verification after action'
phase4_seeding_instructions.rollback_requirement: Each seeded template must have a specific rollback_strategy — NOT the generic 'Revert to pre-execution state'
phase4_seeding_instructions.status_requirement: Seed to templates.jsonl (promoted) not template_candidates.jsonl (candidates) so find_matching() returns them immediately — TemplateRegistry._promoted dict is checked first
